title: Level 330.5
wikitext:
{{Background|file=Level37.5-6.jpg}} {{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 330.5: '''"Liminal Illumination"'''}}
[[File:Level37.5.png|400px|link=]]


Description
Interconnected lukewarm pools in the massive concrete edifice extend without end. White ceramic tiles line the pools bounded by pale white walls. Its arbitrary structures form fanciful modern architecture, creating rooms and spaces surrounded by an odd-shaped framework. The partial wall and overhang ceiling obscured sunlight that left underneath, filling in pockets of shadow. What remains of the light reflected on the water tints the surrounding areas into a cyan hue. Countless pools connect to form a long, submerged pathway, similar to a lazy river. Some may intersect with numerous other branches or intrude into smaller ones that eventually lead to dead ends, whereas others go on out of sight. Most areas stay shallow; some may drop to two meters and never go beyond that depth. Pool jets in numerous locations create a wave throughout the pool complex into a never-ending gentle rippling of water. Too many pool railings that serve no purpose protrude from the pool. Decorative orb stones sink deep and always remain wherever they are. Pool lights that never turn on when there is sufficient light nearby. Upon walking into the pool, one will always feel its soft warmth and the same familiar relaxing sensation. The chlorine odor and noise of the current from an endless sea of water keep the place tranquil and peaceful. At the same time, the empty surroundings provide a strange, isolated feeling. One often describes soaking in the warm water as swimming in a dream.
[[File:Level37.5-2.png|400px|link=]]

An overhead low structure leaves little to no patch for sunlight to brighten in some areas. Here, all the artifact lights are turned on, with neon lights shimmering on the body of water. Rays of pool light penetrate the water, turning the entire space into a vivid cyan where light seeps into the dark corners. Individuals can spot several things near the pool, including neon exit signs, sun loungers, water slides, vending machines, and more. Multiple air conditioners around the place provide a cold, comfortable breeze combined with warm vapor from the lukewarm water.
[[File:Level37.5-3.png|400px|link=]]

Within the intricately designed building, there are also hidden spaces shrouded in darkness. Winding corridors branch into multiple doorways that open to various chambers. All lights on the ceiling remain off, only allowing the external light source to shine through the halls. The soft carpet floor expands in the direction that the hallway wants to go. The layout here also appears perplexing, similar to its outside, with multiple intersections and twists that often lead to nowhere or new pool areas. The hallway forms a maze that stretches into the darkness, marking another presence of the labyrinth behind giant blocks of concrete. One may become lost here for a while.
[[File:Level37.5-1.jpg|400px|link=]]

As previously mentioned, doors in the hallways lead one to discover either an empty room or a pool room. Every room is covered in pool tile with the very same concrete underneath. There are no visible views to the outside, only a source of light streaming from the windows, showing an abyss on the other side. One will find different settings and hues, ranging from the stark white of fluorescent lights to the warm, multi-colored hues of sunset. The outdoor pool and these rooms differ in size but share a similar interior design style. Some rooms appear to imitate the design of their [[Level 37|Sublimity]] counterpart, although their characteristics have changed somewhat. Instances include the pool not filling the entire interior space, the ceramic tiles appearing relatively large, and the light source coming from ceiling lights instead of natural light. Rooms with swimming pools may share the same area, forming a spacious pool room. Furniture and decorations inside still exhibit the same design.
[[File:Level37.5-4.jpg|400px|link=]]

The rooftop area consists of the same connected rooms with pools inside, which can be reached via stairs in the hallways. Their appearance is similar to the aforementioned chambers except that the ceiling is no longer present here, showing a clear blue sky. The size of this section varies depending on the overall structure. The architecture of this area is greatly varied compared to the other locations. One may stumble across a bizarre swimming pool appearance, ranging from tunneling to other areas, featuring sloping bottoms, rising from the ground, containing water volumes smaller than their size, and having half-walls that repeatedly subdivide themselves. Many pools coexist in the same space, creating odd shapes and interior framework.
Dream Pools
 For a while, I was wandering around the [[Level 5|Terror Hotel]]. I looked to my right into a corner and noticed a waterslide in the wall. I was afraid to go through, but... I really need to get out of here. I made the decision to take a chance, accepted the consequences, and hoped that it would take me to a better place.
[[File:Level37.5-5.jpg|400px|link=]]

I went through the slide. The cold air passed over me. I eventually ended up in the dark hallways. I could sense a strange allure coming from the hallway corner. I moved toward the light as the sound of water splashing became audible. I left the hallway and entered the vast room-like structure. Before me, a pool expands indefinitely within the concrete structures, randomly generating and going on forever. The water flowing through the pools has nowhere to go. The vivid light pools shine everywhere, changing their color to cyan as the light seeps into the dark corners.
[[File:Level37.5-6.jpg|400px|link=]]

I decided to explore this place, but the pools blocked my path, forcing me to walk across them. I put my hand in the water, and it was quite warm. As I slowly walked into the pool, the water began to wave. The place is empty, with only concrete and water visible, giving a sense of isolation. As I moved forward, the sky replaced the ceiling, shining a light on me. The sound of water waves keeps the place quiet. It makes me feel calm and peaceful. This place begins to resemble a solitary dream, a place where reality ends. Aimlessly walk further and further... The sky began to close behind the horizon. Until I finally arrived at the edge of the pool and entered [[Level 330|another place]].
[[File:Level37.5-7.jpg|400px|link=]]
